reference: Hi, I have been experiencing sharp, knife-like, piercing pains in the lower part of my stomach, generally a week before my period and a week after. I was on the birth control pill and stopped in two thousand and seven. Ever since then, the pain has started and it has now become even more painful than before. It worsens when I go to the restroom. I am unable to go out as the pain gets so bad that it feels like my entire lower stomach is going to pop out. What could be the cause?
text: While some of us still live and breathe and walk the paths of the living, most of our kinfolk are nothing more than a mere memory, a wisp of a thought in the minds of our ancestors. Those who can read.
